title: Claude 模型在各平台的 API ID 速查
title_en: Claude Model API IDs Across Platforms

body.fact:
每个 Claude 模型在不同平台有不同的 ID，各平台的命名规则并不统一，需按平台逐项查表。以最新模型为例：

| 模型 | Claude API | AWS Bedrock | GCP Vertex AI |
|------|-----------|-------------|---------------|
| Opus 4.6 | `claude-opus-4-6` | `anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1` | `claude-opus-4-6` |
| Sonnet 4.6 | `claude-sonnet-4-6` | `anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6` | `claude-sonnet-4-6` |
| Haiku 4.5 | `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`（别名 `claude-haiku-4-5`） | `anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | `claude-haiku-4-5@20251001` |

注意：Bedrock 的后缀格式不统一（Opus 用 `-v1`，Sonnet 无后缀，Haiku 用 `-v1:0`）；Vertex 对 Haiku 使用 `@日期` 格式而非简单别名。
body.context: 调用 API 时务必查表确认对应平台的正确 ID，不要凭规则推导——各平台命名规则不一致。在 Claude API 上可使用别名（alias），Anthropic 会将其指向最新稳定版本。

body_en.fact:
Each Claude model has different IDs across platforms, and naming conventions are NOT uniform — always look up the table per platform. Latest models:

| Model | Claude API | AWS Bedrock | GCP Vertex AI |
|-------|-----------|-------------|---------------|
| Opus 4.6 | `claude-opus-4-6` | `anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1` | `claude-opus-4-6` |
| Sonnet 4.6 | `claude-sonnet-4-6` | `anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6` | `claude-sonnet-4-6` |
| Haiku 4.5 | `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` (alias `claude-haiku-4-5`) | `anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | `claude-haiku-4-5@20251001` |

Note: Bedrock suffixes are inconsistent (Opus uses `-v1`, Sonnet has no suffix, Haiku uses `-v1:0`); Vertex uses `@date` format for Haiku instead of a plain alias.
body_en.context: Always look up the correct ID per platform — do not derive it from a 'rule.' Naming conventions differ across platforms. On the Claude API, you can use aliases; Anthropic points them to the latest stable version.
